description_long: This is a compact, rectangular filing cabinet with a minimalist design, featuring a light wood or laminate finish on its main body and a flat top surface. The cabinet stands on four slender, black metal legs that elevate it above the ground, giving it a modern and airy appearance. The front face displays two side-by-side drawers with subtle seams, but no visible handles or label holders, suggesting a push-to-open mechanism. The sides and back are plain, with the same wood finish extending around the entire cabinet. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for storing documents or office supplies. Its clean lines and neutral colors make it versatile for various urban environments, such as offices, lobbies, or reception areas.
description: A modern, light wood filing cabinet with two drawers and black metal legs, featuring a minimalist, handle-free design. Its clean lines and neutral tones suit contemporary urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing two seamless drawers with no visible handles or label holders, supported by black metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's depth, flat side panel, and the open rectangular frame of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, uninterrupted wood panel and the back legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the cabinet's depth and leg structure.
